summary: Good audience recording with slight speed/pitch issues but captures a solid performance where the boys played well.
review: The tape, recorded by M Darby, is generally clear and enjoyable, though several reviewers note it runs a half‑step fast and could benefit from proper speed calibration. Musically the concert was praised as a strong show with the band playing well, even if no specific songs were singled out.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is regarded as good (solid performance) while recording quality is good but marred by speed/pitch problems; the weighted average yields a ~4‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear overall sound, but several comments about the tape running slightly fast (≈½ step) and pitch being off; reviewers suggest speed calibration would improve it.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed set‑list commentary; reviewers simply note that the band was playing well throughout.
